nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 墨西哥
nodes.summary: 墨西哥是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、棕穴䳍、草黃樹鴨等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LeConte's thrasher
nodes.summary: LeConte's thrasher（LeConte's thrasher，学名 Toxostoma lecontei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯、美國西南部、墨西哥，常见栖息地包括滩涂。

nodes.name: 喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯
nodes.summary: 喬治·紐博爾德·勞倫斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括Antillean nighthawk、Cinnamon becard、Black-tailed myiobius等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 美國西南部
nodes.summary: 美國西南部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括Least grebe、黑頸鸊鷉、走鵑等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: LeConte's thrasher (Toxostoma lecontei) is a pale bird found in the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: LeConte's thrasher (Toxostoma lecontei) is a pale bird found in the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: This bird ranges from California as far west as the San Joaquin Valley through southern Nevada and southwestern Utah and central and southern Arizona, and is a resident species throughout its range. It resides in some of the harshest climates in its region, including the Sonoran Desert and the San Joaquin Valley, and where annual rainfall only averages 4 to 20 cm. The typical desert habitat consists of dunes, alluvial fans, and flat to gently rolling hills with shallow washes with sparse vegetation. The vegetation that it may utilize includes low vegetation such as saltbush, creosote, cholla cacti, and Mojave yucca. The range of altitude spans as low as 80 m below sea level (in Death Valley) to as high as 1,600 m, although 500 m above sea level is the average. It does not generally coexist with other thrashers due to its habitat, but does overlap breeding ranges and general habitat with the California thrasher in the higher desert regions of its range. The thrasher has had its population decline in certain regions of its range, notably the Coachella, Imperial and the San Joaquin Valley regions.{{cite web|title=8
